---
title: "muninn.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/muninn.py"
loc: 28
complexity: 2
logic_score: 5.63
style_score: 3.93
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.74
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating Muninn, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import Muninn and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 360 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_heart](file://src.sentinel.muninn_heart)
- [traceback](file://traceback)

### Exports
- `Muninn`
- `__init__`
- `run_cycle`
